canonical_queue_note: Deliberately prioritized ahead of the current next queue because Mike selected this fresh Astrid report as the design anchor for the provenance/evidence tranche.

claims.summary: Preserve Astrid's felt report that Mirror and Witness have become difficult to distinguish, rather than reducing the 32% loss to a generic telemetry anomaly.
Separate Minime-owned observation, bridge-derived reflective evidence, and Astrid-authored interpretation with exact parent identities and field paths.
Run Astrid's Spectral Distinction Test offline against one Astrid-only memory, one Minime-owned shadow record, and one known shared-correspondence control.
Increasing semantic trickle or admission for the requested Pressure Response Test remains Tier 5 operator approval work and was not performed.
Place a read-only self/other provenance category before Dialogue while keeping it outside routing, ranking, dispatch, gain, and control decisions.
Retain the current stable-core, settled-habitable, entropy, pressure-risk, and mode-packing observations as cited felt evidence without changing their producer calculations.
